name: Kaplamin Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Kaplamin Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells packaging materials in Turkey. It provides corrugated boards for food, durable, chemical and cleaning, automotive, heavy duty, ceramic tiles and sanitary ware, and YSM packaging applications. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.
